fixture.title: Seeded Localization Defects
fixture.summary: Synthetic public localization QA corpus with oracle-backed seeded defects, false-positive calibration cases, and defect coverage matrix for expected benchmark findings.

license.evidence: Synthetic fixture text, expected findings, and QA metadata authored for repository tests; no third-party raw assets.

provenance.author: Itotori contributors
provenance.creationMethod: Hand-authored seeded localization QA corpus for deterministic QA, QA-agent, triage, and benchmark calibration.

aggregateStats.notes: Fixture covers lost markup, wrong speaker, style violation, glossary drift, semantic mistranslation, over-literal MTL, line length/UI overflow, and false-positive QA calibration cases. Expected findings use itotori-lqa-1 taxonomy categories, quality severities, root causes, detector kinds, and adjudication states.
